heading: Reports to trustee
label: 1346 Reports to trustee
notes: Amendments1980—Par. (2). , inserted “basic” before “benefits” and “or 1322a” after “1322”.Pub. L. 96–364, § 403(e)(1)Par. (3). , inserted “basic” before “benefits” and “or 1322a” after “1322”, and substituted “1322b” for “1322(b)(5)”.Pub. L. 96–364, § 403(e)

children.text: the amount of benefits payable with respect to each participant under a plan to be terminated,
the amount of basic benefits guaranteed under section 1322 or 1322a of this title which are payable with respect to each participant in the plan,

the present value, as of the time of termination, of the aggregate amount of basic benefits payable under section 1322 or 1322a of this title (determined without regard to ),section 1322b of this title
the fair market value of the assets of the plan at the time of termination,
the computations under , and all actuarial assumptions under which the items described in paragraphs (1) through (4) were computed, andsection 1344 of this title
any other information with respect to the plan the trustee may require in order to terminate the plan.
